extraction.one_line_summary: BAGGIOLI Andrea timed final acceleration perfectly on rolling finale into Barcelona after INEOS failed to distance IGITA on Montsouche climbs
tactical_patterns: INEOS Grenadiers ground pace on Montsouche climbs targeting 16-second gap but IGITA neutralized CARAPAZ attacks by sitting his wheel
JUMBO Visma drove descent with 3.5km remaining, bringing 12-15 riders back to front sextet and neutering breakaway advantage
BAGGIOLI exploited rolling Barcelona finale terrain while GC favorites watched each other, preserving energy through descent regrouping

rider_signals.IGITA: positive: Neutralized CARAPAZ wheel-to-wheel on Montsouche despite INEOS grinding pace to exploit 16-second deficit
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Struggled slightly on final Montsouche ascent, needed descent to regain front group with 3.5km remaining
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: Appeared dropped on climb but fought back, ultimately missed podium by single place despite late positioning
rider_signals.BAGGIOLI Andrea: positive: Showed QuickStep pattern of targeting rolling finales over pure climbing, avoided GC marking to take stage
